title: Ctenitis tenerifrons
taxonomy: Ctenitis tenerifrons is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Ctenitis, which is a group of ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The family Dryopteridaceae is a large group of ferns that are characterized by their simple leaves and forked or pinnate fronds. The classification of Ctenitis tenerifrons reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns, which are thought to have diverged from a common ancestor. The taxonomy of Ctenitis tenerifrons continues to be refined as new research and discoveries shed more light on its relationships within the plant kingdom.
